apps.title: Ghost Sniper: War FPS Shooter
apps.summary:
Become the ultimate invisible predator in the most realistic sniper game!

Welcome to Ghost Sniper: War FPS Shooter, the premier military offline experience where precision is the only thing between victory and defeat. As an elite ghost sniper, you are deployed into high-stakes missions across the globe. Experience intense 3D gun shooter action that demands tactical mastery and a steady hand in the heat of a total war strike.

🌍 Global Battlefields & Tactical Missions
This is not just another shooting gallery. Our action war game takes you to the world’s deadliest conflict zones:
• The Middle East (Iraq & Afghanistan): Engage targets in dusty urban labyrinths and guard strategic outposts in vast desert landscapes.
• Eastern Europe: Navigate the chilling atmosphere of abandoned cities and desolate industrial ruins.
• Africa: Neutralize threats across wide-open savannas and volatile border crossings.
• South & Central American Jungles: Hunt down guerilla insurgents in dense tropical foliage where every shadow hides a secret.

🎯 Advanced Physics & Realistic 3D Graphics
Experience a true 3D sniper simulation powered by a cutting-edge physics engine:
• True Ballistics: Master the art of the long shot. Calculate for wind speed, bullet drop (gravity), and target movement.
• Realistic Combat: High-fidelity animations and destructible environments make every war strike feel impactful.
• AAA Visuals: Console-quality textures and dynamic lighting bring the battlefield to life on your mobile device.

🔫 Deadly Arsenal & Customization
Choose your weapon from a massive collection of military-grade gear:
• Legendary bolt-action rifles, semi-auto snipers, and suppressed firearms for stealth operations.
• Deep Customization: Upgrade your scopes, magazines, barrels, and stocks to build the perfect tool for military shooting.

🛠 Key Game Features:
• Offline Shooter: No internet? No problem. Enjoy the full campaign anytime, anywhere.
• FPS Action: Immersive first-person perspective designed for maximum combat flow.
• Tactical Ops: Plan your approach, utilize cover, and remain a ghost until the mission is complete.
• Modern Warfare: Face a variety of enemies, from elite units to hidden guerilla cells.
• Free to Play: Experience the complete war game experience for free.

Join the ranks of the world's most elite marksmen. Download Ghost Sniper: War FPS Shooter now and prove you are the best shot in the business.

One shot, one kill. Leave no trace.

apps.title: Rhythm Tiles: Pop Songs
apps.summary:
🚀 Step into the neon future of Rhythm Games and enjoy cyber music piano！
Are you ready to test your reflexes and become a true piano master? Welcome to Rhythm Tiles, the most immersive and visually stunning cyber music experience on mobile! If you are a fan of piano games, rhythm games, and high-octane music games, you’ve just found your next obsession.
This isn't just another casual piano game; it’s a high-speed journey through a digital universe where every tap creates a symphony. Whether you're a fan of Kpop games, EDM, or classic pop, Rhythm Tiles brings the beat to your fingertips in a way you've never felt before.

---
🕹️ How to Play: Tap, Slide, and Conquer the Beat!
Rhythm Tiles is designed to be intuitive for beginners but offers a legendary challenge for rhythm game pros.
1. Watch the Screen: As the rhythm tiles fall from the top in a sleek cyber interface, get your fingers ready!
2. Tap the Tiles: Tap the black or colored tiles exactly as they hit the rhythm line.
3. Hold & Slide: For long notes, press and hold to sustain the melody.
4. Precision is Key: Don't miss a tile! Missing even one will break your combo and end your run.
5. Boost Your Score: Collect glowing balls and golds on the track to trigger "Fever Mode" and double your points!

---
🔥 Why Rhythm Tiles is the Ultimate Music Game?
🎶 A Massive, Ever-Growing Song Library
From the latest chart-topping Kpop hits to pulse-pounding EDM and classic piano masterpieces, our song games library is updated weekly. No matter your taste, you’ll find the perfect beat to play along to.
🌌 Stunning Cyberpunk Visuals
Escape into a world of neon lights and futuristic aesthetics. Our cyber theme transforms every piano game session into a visual feast, with dynamic backgrounds that react to your performance.
📶 No Wifi? No Problem! (Offline Games)
Searching for no wifi games? We’ve got you covered. Enjoy the full rhythm game experience anywhere—on a plane, the subway, or in the middle of nowhere. Rhythm Tiles is one of the premier offline games for music lovers.
🏆 Compete and Unlock
Unlock unique skins for your tiles and even different "sound fonts." Want your piano to sound like a digital synth or a classic grand? The choice is yours. Collect balls of light to unlock secret "Hardcore" versions of your favorite tracks.

---
⭐ Key Features ⭐
Free Games Excellence: Download and play for free! Experience high-quality music games content without a price tag.
Piano Games Perfection: Smooth, responsive tap mechanics that make you feel like a real piano master.
Kpop Games Mode: Dedicated playlists featuring the hottest Kpop music and idols.
Rhythm & Beat Mastery: Test your hand-eye coordination with various difficulty levels, from "Chill" to "Cyber Legend."
Fun Games for Everyone: A fun game that’s easy to pick up for kids, yet deep enough for adults and pro gamers.
Small Footprint: Optimized to run smoothly on all devices while maintaining high-fidelity audio.
No Wifi Games: Fully functional offline games support for on-the-go entertainment.
Interactive Effects: Watch the balls and sparks fly with every perfect tap on the tiles.

---
👑 Become a Rhythm Legend
Stop just listening to music and start playing it! Rhythm Tiles combines the addictive nature of tile tapping with the soul of a professional piano game. Improve your timing, challenge your friends on the global leaderboards, and see if you have the speed to handle the fastest rhythm games on the market.
Ready to drop the beat?
👉 Download Rhythm Tiles for FREE today and let your cyber journey begin!

apps.title: Ever Night: Reawakening
apps.summary:
When the sun's light is swallowed by the abyss, the world falls into eternal night. Demons run wild, civilization nears collapse. In Ever Night, you become the fate-driven LightChaser, embarking on an epic journey across a dark land of despair and miracles. Awaken heroes, form your strongest Party, and uncover the conspiracy behind the Eternal Night to restore the light!

Immersive dark aesthetics, an epic audiovisual feast.
The next-gen engine delivers stunning dark fantasy visuals, complete with intricately detailed environments and dazzling skill effects for a true cinematic experience. Explore mysterious shadowy forests, decaying ancient castles, and deep subterranean abysses as you dive into a breathtaking, immersive storyline.

Massive heroes assemble, strategic combos turn the tide.
Five factions and over a hundred unique heroes await your summon! Warriors, mages, assassins, supporters… freely mix classes and skills. Utilize faction counters and bond bonuses to craft your signature lineup, defeat stronger foes with wit and experience mind-burning strategic gameplay.

Friendly idle play – grow stronger while offline.
No grind, just fun! The smart idle system grants huge rewards even when you're offline. Epic gear and massive resources can be claimed with a single tap upon login, keeping your heroes at peak strength to breeze through every challenge.

Diverse and rich gameplay, explore the endless abyss.
Beyond the gripping main campaign, a variety of modes await your challenge, including Roguelike dungeon exploration, tower trials, world bosses, and more. Every adventure is a fresh experience, with random events and hidden chests keeping the journey full of surprises.

Global server-wide competition, uphold your guild's honor.
Join a guild, forge bonds with trusted allies, and stand together against formidable cross-server invaders. Engage in thrilling arena battles and guild wars, competing against players across the globe. Ascend the leaderboards to claim unparalleled glory and rich rewards!

The light shall never be extinguished, nor hope ever lost. Download Ever Night today and embark on your own journey of redemption!

apps.title: Frontier City
apps.summary:
After a cataclysmic nuclear war, clouds of radiation forever cover the skies of the wastelands.

You are the last light of humankind, and the mayor of a city of survivors. Outside, millions upon millions of zombies mutated by radiation and ever hungry roam in hordes, constantly seeking to devour the life within the city's walls. Inside are the terrified and weary survivors who have placed their last hopes on your leadership. Resources are scarce, dangers close on all sides, and the orders of old has toppled.

You must build high walls, give light to the city, and build a home over the despair, rebooting civilization amidst the ruins.

Will this city become humanity's ark? Or will it become its grave? Only you have the answer.

Wasteland Construction
In a resource scarce and desperate world, plan and build houses and farms, and electric and hydro facilities, maintaining the hope and lives of the survivors.

Desperate Defenses
Build sturdy city walls and defensive systems, deploy elite troops and withstand the endless tide of raging mutants.

Explore the Unknown
Send armies to explore wastelands encircled by danger, seeking precious supplies, deciphering the ruins, and unravelling plot upon plot, of how the world came to its end.

Conflicting Factions
Build Alliances with other player cities, or launch wars to seize rare resources. On these vile wastes, cooperation and betrayal are eternal themes.

apps.title: Lords War
apps.summary:
The kingdom is under siege and your home is at stake.
Creatures of darkness are devouring every living soul in their path. This is a war that you can’t afford to lose.
Under your command, every unit counts. Lead your force to victory and glory, with meticulous planning and genius tactics! Are you prepared?

1. Unlock Screws
As a seasoned artisan, deftly unlock screws and disentangle each contorted piece of iron from the intricate tapestry of impediments. Do you possess the foresight and cerebral acumen to untangle these mazes?

2.Gate of Multiplication
Launch your assault on the zombie hordes. Use simple math on the fly to choose the best path. Hit the multiplier gates to swell your numbers and overwhelm the enemy with sheer force!

3.Massive Legions
Why settle for dozens when you can lead thousands? Dive into epic clashes with over 2,000 units on screen. With 11 unique troop classes and powerful heroes, the power is in your hands.

4.Ultimate Conquest
Claim the Dark Throne, revive the dragon, and rule this fantasy world as the undisputed King of Kings!

apps.title: Bamboo Breeze Mahjong
apps.summary:
Bamboo Breeze Mahjong is a classic tile-matching puzzle game designed for relaxation and mental focus. Match identical pairs of traditional Mahjong tiles to clear the board and progress through levels at your own pace. Set against a serene bamboo forest backdrop, this game offers a calm, pressureless environment to unwind.

🀄 Classic Tile Matching Gameplay
Simply tap on open pairs of identical tiles to remove them from the board. The goal is to clear all tiles to complete the level. With no strict timers or high-pressure scoring systems, you can enjoy a steady, natural flow of play during short breaks or longer sessions.

🌿 Visually Soothing Bamboo Theme
Enjoy a clean and uncluttered visual experience inspired by nature, designed to make your puzzle-solving experience comfortable:
Peaceful Backgrounds: Play with soft green bamboo grove visuals that help reduce eye strain and digital fatigue.
Large Tiles: The game features large, clearly distinguished symbols and characters, making it easy to read and navigate.
Subtle Feedback: Experience gentle animations and authentic tile sounds with every successful match.

🧠 Gentle Brain Training
Keep your mind active and engaged through pattern recognition and spatial memory practice. The puzzles range from simple layouts to more structured arrangements, offering a gentle mental workout that fits seamlessly into your day.

⏰ Scheduled Relaxation Reminders
Build a consistent wellness routine with our integrated alarm feature. Easily schedule dedicated moments for your daily breaks directly within the application. When your selected time arrives, a friendly push notification will remind you to step away from your busy routine, unwind, and refresh your mind with a quick puzzle session.

- New stages to unlock and complete
- Relaxing arcade progression for quick sessions
- Drop coins, collect rewards, and build the ultimate Coin Collector machine.

apps.title: Kingdom Fall: Zombie Defense
apps.summary:
The kingdom that stood for centuries has fallen within weeks. A mysterious plague swept through the land, turning the dead into mindless monsters that devour everything in their path. Castles lie in ruins, villages are abandoned, and the few survivors who remain have lost all hope. But you refuse to surrender.

As a brave Lord leading a band of desperate survivors, you must rebuild from the ashes, recruit legendary heroes, and defend your stronghold against endless waves of undead that hunger for the living. In this dark age where betrayal and desperation reign, your courage and tactical brilliance will determine whether your people see another sunrise.

Kingdom Fall is a game of valor, strategy, and resilience. Every choice shapes your kingdom's destiny and your legacy as a leader. Will you focus on fortifying your castle walls and training elite defenders, or will you venture into the cursed lands to reclaim lost territories and uncover the source of the plague? The dead are rising, darkness spreads across the realm, and your people look to you for salvation! Do you have what it takes to restore the kingdom's glory?

GAME FEATURES

Rescue and Shelter Survivors: Venture beyond your walls to rescue survivors trapped in overrun villages and abandoned outposts. Bring them to your settlement, where they will pledge their loyalty and help rebuild the fallen kingdom.

Build Your Medieval Stronghold: Construct and upgrade castles, barracks, farms, and defensive structures to create an impregnable fortress. Manage resources wisely and transform your humble refuge into a thriving kingdom.

Recruit Powerful Heroes: Summon valiant knights, cunning rogues, powerful mages, and skilled archers to fight under your banner. Promote and equip them with legendary weapons and armor to lead your armies to victory.

Defend Against the Undead Hordes: Fortify your defenses with towers and elite guards. Command your forces in tactical battles against relentless zombie sieges that grow stronger with each passing night.

Forge Mighty Alliances: Unite with Lords from across the realm to form powerful alliances. Coordinate strategies, share resources, and wage epic wars against rival factions competing for control of the shattered kingdom.

SPECIAL NOTES
· This game includes random-item purchases.
· Network connection is required.
· Privacy Policy: https://www.leyinetwork.com/en/privacy/
· Terms of Use: https://www.leyinetwork.com/en/privacy/terms_of_use

apps.title: Skull Hero
apps.summary:
Enter the world of heroes, where you'll rise from zero to hero. Farm XP, fight monsters, upgrade your hero to join the fight against mysterious enemies, grow stronger, and conquer powerful bosses in an endless adventure.

Features

1. Fight for Power up
Use your skills to attack, dodge, and control each battle. Survive waves of monsters and turn risky fights into victory. Every stage challenges your reflexes and strategy.

2. Farm XP, Gain Infinite Power
Defeat, collect, and upgrade your hero in a simple but addictive, Your HP and Attack will increase after each enemy defeat.

3. Weapons & Skills
Each weapon has a special skill; hone them and they will give you more power.

4. Challenging Boss Fights
Face bosses with precise timing in cursed jungles, icy lands, and barren deserts,... Each battle tests your skill, patience, and hero upgrades. Overcome traps and monster waves to claim valuable rewards.

5. Fantasy Adventure
Each time you defeat a boss, you'll experience new and mysterious lands that will make you stronger and provide you with more valuable experiences and rewards.

How to play:
- Easy control with just one finger.
- Farm XP by defeating monsters
- Choose the suitable weapon for each location
- Upgrade weapon.
- Purchase support items when needed.

Final call, download now, embark on your dark adventure become the hero!

apps.title: Colony Flow!
apps.summary:
🐜 Welcome to Colony Flow — a relaxing ant colony puzzle where every tiny worker has a mission: carry colorful cubes, follow the trail, and help you discover beautiful pixel art!

Deep inside the colony, the ants are ready to work together. 👆 Simply tap a cube stack to send an ant marching. Each ant picks up colorful cubes and carries them to the matching color hole. Sort every color, clear the board, and discover vibrant pixel art along the way.

🧠 Lead the colony with smart moves
🐜 Send worker ants from each cube stack
🎨 Match cubes by color
🕳️ Guide cubes to the correct color holes
📦 Manage limited colony slots
🧩 Clear the entire board
🖼️ Discover beautiful pixel art

But the colony needs a great leader! Sorting space is limited, so one wrong move can block the trail. Plan ahead, free up space, and guide your ants in the perfect order to complete every puzzle.

🌈 Explore hundreds of colorful colony missions featuring adorable pixel art themes, including animals, fruits, food, flowers, nature, holidays, toys, rockets, castles, and many more surprises.

🎵 With cute ants, smooth marching animations, calming music, and no time pressure, Colony Flow is the perfect game to enjoy during a relaxing break, a cozy evening, or anytime you want to play offline.

Features:
🐜 Charming ant colony gameplay
🐾 Tiny worker ants carrying colorful cubes
🎯 Relaxing color sorting puzzles
🖼️ Unlock beautiful pixel art
👆 Simple one-tap controls
🧠 Fun and challenging brain teasers
⏳ No timer, no pressure
📴 Play offline anytime, anywhere
🚀 From easy levels to tricky colony missions

Command the colony, sort the cubes, clear the trail, and complete beautiful pixel art in Colony Flow! 🐜🎨🧩
